name: Basler Brunsli
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE THE SUGAR and almonds in the food processor and pulse to grind finely. Be careful that the mixture does not become warm.
2. CUT THE CHOCOLATE finely and add to the processor. Pulse to grind the chocolate finely and mix with the almonds and sugar.
3. ADD THE REMAINING INGREDIENTS and pulse to mix rapidly.
4. SPREAD THE MIXTURE on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, about 3/8-inch thick.
5. ROLL THE BATTER over with a grooved rolling pin.
6. CUT INTO HEARTS, STARS, AND CLOVER-LEAF SHAPES using a cookie cutter.
7. PLACE THE COOKIES on paper-lined pans.
8. ALLOW TO DRY SEVERAL HOURS, UNCOVERED, AT ROOM TEMPERATURE.
9. PREHEAT OVEN TO 300°F.
10. BAKE FOR ABOUT 10 MINUTES. DO NOT OVERBAKE OR THEY WILL BE VERY HARD.
